Local-born guides

Every guide lives in their region — no outsiders, no scripts.

Verified listings

ETB & USD pricing

Travelers say

Real stories from real adventurers

"The Simien Mountains guide knew every trail, every bird call. Nothing could have prepared me for how perfect it was."

Sarah K.

Simien Mountains

"Booking in ETB made me feel like a local. The Lalibela experience was beyond spiritual."

Yohannes T.

Lalibela

"The Danakil guide kept us safe in 50°C heat and still made every moment magical. Worth every birr."

Marco B.

Danakil Depression
